name: writeSpreadsheet
description: Writes data to a specific range in a Google Spreadsheet. Overwrites existing data in the range.

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the Google Spreadsheet (from the URL).

range.description: A1 notation range to write to (e.g., "A1:B2" or "Sheet1!A1:B2").

values.description: 2D array of values to write. Each inner array represents a row.

valueInputOption.description: How input data should be interpreted. RAW: values are stored as-is. USER_ENTERED: values are parsed as if typed by a user.
